# function: cidr_intersect

Returns the set of CIDRs that represent the address space shared between list `a` and list `b`. The result is merged into the smallest equivalent set.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidr_intersect(a list of string, b list of string) list of string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `a` (List of String) First list of CIDRs.
1. `b` (List of String) Second list of CIDRs.
